name: novapharm-healthcare-website
description: Enterprise-grade NovaPharm Healthcare website with secure portal, admin surfaces, SEO/GEO optimization, and SharePoint integration architecture.

scripts.start:production: npm run build && node scripts/sync-secure-content.mjs && node server.mjs
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-site.mjs && node scripts/check-links.mjs && node scripts/validate-app.mjs && node scripts/validate-domain.mjs && node scripts/audit-public-claims.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:integration && npm run test:production-security
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run validate && npm run syntax && npm run security:scan && npm test
